translations: So he watered for them Then
he turned back to the shade
and said My Lord Indeed, I am
of whatever You send to me
puzzle.hint: A prophet's humble supplication for any good after performing a selfless act in a foreign land.
puzzle.arabic: فَسَقَىٰ لَهُمَا ثُمَّ تَوَلَّىٰٓ إِلَى ٱلظِّلِّ فَقَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّى لِمَآ أَنزَلْتَ إِلَىَّ مِنْ خَيْرٍۢ فَقِيرٌۭ
puzzle.verseEn: So he watered [their flocks] for them; then he went back to the shade and said, "My Lord, indeed I am, for whatever good You would send down to me, in need."
